# liveTouchBar

**Instance Property**

An object you use to add items to the Touch Bar of supported MacBook Pro models.

## Declaration

```swift
final var liveTouchBar: NSTouchBar? { get set }
```

## Related Documentation

- **Touch Bar**: Display interactive content and controls in the Touch Bar.
